# PERF-183 positive: context.WithTimeout inside a loop
lang: go
file: PERF-183-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"context"
	"time"
)

func PerCall(items []int) []int {
	out := make([]int, 0, len(items))
	for _, item := range items {
		ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), time.Second)
		_ = ctx
		_ = cancel
		out = append(out, item)
	}
	return out
}
